page_metadata.biotools__summary: With this tool you can calculate Elementary Conversion Modes (ECMs) from metabolic networks. Combinations of ECMs form all metabolic influence an organism can exert on its environment.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: With this tool you can calculate Elementary Conversion Modes (ECMs) from metabolic networks. Combinations of ECMs form all metabolic influence an organism can exert on its environment.
